events.label: assistant
events.text: Findings written to `/app/answer.json`: the joint is **fail / high risk** — two missing bolts, uneven thread projection, and no torque witness marks mean the joint cannot safely go to hydrotest. Corrective actions include completing the bolt-up, re-torquing in a star pattern per ASME PCC-1, applying witness marks, and QA sign-off before test.
